Told Musty Mustard rats do jiu-jitsu.

 

Musty said, I don't think so.

 

Searched it up.

 

AI results say the following.

 

Spoiler alert, AI is not there yet, this isn't right.

 

See below for why.

 

An AI result says the following:

 

"... No, rats do not actually practice the martial art of Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu..."

 

Picture here:

 

 

 

 

But that is wrong, we know.

 

A.) Not only do rats do jiu-jitsu.

 

B.) They invented it.

 

C.) The average rat, even if they don't practice jiu-jitsu daily, is still a more skilled jiu-jitsu player than the top 1% of humans who are frequent jiu-jitsu players.

 

So there you have it.
